description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile sports car with a glossy black exterior and a streamlined, aerodynamic shape. The car features a sharply contoured hood, wide front grille, and angular headlights that give it an aggressive, high-performance look. Its side profile reveals a two-door coupe design with tinted windows and prominent wheel arches housing alloy wheels. The roofline is low and tapers smoothly towards the rear, emphasizing speed and agility. The wheels are metallic with a multi-spoke pattern, and the car sits close to the ground, suggesting a focus on handling and performance. Subtle green accents are visible on the windshield and front details, adding a touch of contrast to the otherwise dark color scheme.
description: A glossy black, low-slung sports car with a streamlined body, angular headlights, and metallic multi-spoke wheels. Subtle green accents highlight its aggressive, high-performance design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, angular headlights, and green accents on the hood and windshield.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the low roofline, two-door coupe design, and metallic multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tapered back, rear window, and the car's overall compact, aerodynamic shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same low profile, wheel design, and door placement.
